measurement_note: Size is U + R, the combined user and ride row count. Every user has two rides and appears in the ordered output. The 24/96/384-row tiers span 16x. Left join plus grouping takes O(U + R + U log U) time. A correct de-indexed correlated sum rescans Rides for every user, taking O(UR + U log U) time and completing normally.
